summary: Iteration 65: Complete testing of subscription system features. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Subscriptions page with 'ТЕКУЩ ПЛАН' banner, Profile SubscriptionDashboard, Calculator without AI Blueprint, AI Sketch with PNG download, AI Designer with 3 packages.
passed_tests: ✅ All plans have name, price, features fields
✅ GET /api/subscriptions/my - returns subscription status with days_remaining
✅ GET /api/subscriptions/my-limits - returns plan limits and features
✅ Pro plan has pdf_contracts=true, basic has pdf_contracts=false
✅ 'ТЕКУЩ ПЛАН' green banner on active plan card (ПРО)
✅ Calculator page loads - AI Blueprint button NOT present (removed)
✅ AI Sketch page loads with CAD tools and 360° Live Preview
✅ PNG Download button 'Свали като изображение (PNG)' visible and working
✅ AI Designer page shows 3 packages: 69€ (1 room), 129€ (2 rooms), 199€ (Apartment/5 rooms)
✅ Profile Payments tab shows SubscriptionDashboard with plan name, offers progress bar
✅ Feature locks displayed (PDF Договори, AI Скици, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: 3. ✅ Feature access control based on plan
4. ✅ MOCKED: Stripe payment - subscriptions activate without real payment in test mode
5. ✅ UI properly displays current plan with 'ТЕКУЩ ПЛАН' banner
6. ✅ Profile SubscriptionDashboard shows plan details, limits, feature locks
7. ✅ AI Blueprint removed from calculator as requested
8. ✅ PNG download button added to CAD page
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test company user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 fully tested subscription management system. PRO subscription is active for testpro@test.bg. All subscription endpoints (/api/subscriptions/*) working correctly. Frontend subscription UI (SubscriptionsPage, SubscriptionDashboard) verified. Calculator AI Blueprint removed. CAD page has PNG download button. AI Designer has 3 packages (69/129/199 EUR).

mocked_apis.Stripe payment: Subscription activation works in test mode without real payment processing

verified_features.subscription_dashboard: Profile → Плащания tab shows plan, offers progress, feature locks
verified_features.cad_png_download: ADDED - data-testid='download-cad-image' with text 'Свали като изображение (PNG)'
